vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-540: Remove convoy abstraction, inline parallel review directly into review-agent

plan.title: Remove convoy abstraction, inline parallel review directly into review-agent
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: The convoy abstraction exists solely to let review-agent.ts spawn 4 parallel reviewers + synthesis in a fixed order. The generic template registry, state persistence in ~/.panopticon/convoys/, CLI commands, dashboard panel/hook/nav, and convoy:* model router keys are all overhead for a single use case. The intended multi-issue fleet runner was never built.
narratives.Proposal: Inline the parallel-review pipeline directly into review-agent.ts and delete the convoy abstraction entirely. Keep the 4+1 reviewer pipeline (correctness, security, performance, requirements + synthesis) hardcoded — no new YAML config schema. Rename convoy:* model router keys to review:* as a clean break. Delete all convoy CLI, API, and dashboard surface immediately.

items.title: Inline parallel review pipeline into review-agent.ts

narrative.Action: Refactor spawnReviewAgent() in src/lib/cloister/review-agent.ts to spawn 4 parallel reviewers (correctness, security, performance, requirements) directly via tmux, poll for all 4 to complete, then run the synthesis agent. Inline the parseConvoySynthesis() logic. Preserve output dir structure (.claude/reviews/<id>/), GitHub PR posting, and feedback-to-work-agent paths unchanged. Remove imports from ../convoy.js.

subItems.title: spawnReviewAgent no longer imports startConvoy/waitForConvoy/ConvoyContext from ../convoy.js
4 reviewers (correctness, security, performance, requirements) are spawned in parallel via tmux sessions named pan-review-<id>-<name>
Pipeline waits for all 4 reviewer outputs (<output-dir>/<name>.md) before spawning the synthesis agent
Synthesis agent runs in its own tmux session and writes <output-dir>/synthesis.md after all reviewers complete

Synthesis parser reads REVIEW_RESULT, FILES_REVIEWED, SECURITY_ISSUES, PERFORMANCE_ISSUES markers from synthesis.md and merges per-reviewer findings from correctness.md, security.md, performance.md, requirements.md
postGitHubPRReview and sendFeedbackToWorkAgent are called with the same inputs they currently receive
No blocking sync IO (readFileSync/writeFileSync/execSync) is added in the refactored code path — use fs/promises and execAsync
Review-agent resolves reviewer models via the new review:<name> model router keys (review:correctness, review:security, review:performance, review:requirements, review:synthesis)

items.title: Rename convoy:* model router keys to review:*

narrative.Action: Rename the five convoy:* work type keys to review:* in src/lib/work-types.ts, src/lib/smart-model-selector.ts, and src/lib/settings-api.ts. Mapping: convoy:correctness-reviewer → review:correctness, convoy:security-reviewer → review:security, convoy:performance-reviewer → review:performance, convoy:requirements-reviewer → review:requirements, convoy:synthesis-agent → review:synthesis. Default model assignments (opus for security, sonnet for others) are preserved unchanged. No legacy fallback — clean break.

subItems.title: src/lib/work-types.ts contains review:correctness, review:security, review:performance, review:requirements, review:synthesis entries with the same descriptions that were on their convoy:* predecessors
src/lib/work-types.ts contains no convoy:* entries
src/lib/settings-api.ts default model map uses review:* keys; review:security defaults to claude-opus-4-6; other four default to claude-sonnet-4-6
src/lib/smart-model-selector.ts uses review:* keys and no longer references convoy:*
No reference to the string "convoy:" remains anywhere under src/lib/

narrative.Action: Delete src/lib/convoy.ts and src/lib/convoy-templates.ts. Remove all imports of these modules across the codebase. Depends on inline-review-pipeline completing first, since review-agent.ts is the only remaining consumer.

subItems.title: src/lib/convoy.ts does not exist
src/lib/convoy-templates.ts does not exist
No file in the repo imports from '../convoy.js', '../convoy-templates.js', './convoy.js', or './convoy-templates.js'
No code references the types ConvoyContext, ConvoyState, ConvoyAgentState, ConvoyTemplate

narrative.Action: Delete src/cli/commands/convoy/ directory (index.ts, start.ts, stop.ts, list.ts, status.ts). Remove the registerConvoyCommands call from the CLI entrypoint. `pan convoy ...` must no longer be a valid subcommand.

subItems.title: src/cli/commands/convoy/ directory does not exist
`pan convoy --help` prints an unknown-command error, not a subcommand list
No import of './commands/convoy' or ./commands/convoy/index remains in the CLI entrypoint

items.title: Remove convoy endpoints from dashboard server

narrative.Action: Remove the five convoy routes from src/dashboard/server/routes/metrics.ts: GET /api/convoys, GET /api/convoys/:id, POST /api/convoys/start, POST /api/convoys/:id/stop, GET /api/convoys/:id/output. Remove the associated handler functions and imports from ../../../lib/convoy.js. If metrics.ts becomes empty after this, leave the file in place with its other metrics routes intact — do not delete metrics.ts itself.

subItems.title: GET /api/convoys returns 404 (route no longer registered)
POST /api/convoys/start returns 404
src/dashboard/server/routes/metrics.ts contains no reference to startConvoy, stopConvoy, getConvoyStatus, listConvoys, or the string 'convoy'
Non-convoy routes in metrics.ts still work (no regression in existing /api/metrics endpoints)

items.title: Remove convoy UI from dashboard frontend

narrative.Action: Delete src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/ConvoyPanel.tsx and src/dashboard/frontend/src/hooks/useConvoys.ts. Remove the 'convoys' nav entry from Sidebar.tsx and its route from App.tsx. In Settings/SettingsPage.tsx, replace the 'Convoy Reviewers' section with a 'Code Review' section that renders model override cards for the renamed review:* work types (correctness, security, performance, requirements, synthesis). Update Settings/types.ts to reference review:* keys.

subItems.title: src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/ConvoyPanel.tsx does not exist
src/dashboard/frontend/src/hooks/useConvoys.ts does not exist
Sidebar.tsx has no 'convoys' tab and App.tsx has no convoys route
Settings page shows a Code Review section with model override UI for all 5 review:* keys; no 'Convoy Reviewers' section remains
Users can change the model for any of the 5 reviewers from the Settings UI and the change persists (same behavior as the old Convoy Reviewers UI)
No file under src/dashboard/frontend/ contains the string 'convoy' (case-insensitive) except where unrelated (e.g. generated types)

narrative.Action: Remove the Convoys TOC entry and section from docs/USAGE.md. Remove any convoy references from docs/INDEX.md if present. Do not introduce new documentation for the inlined review pipeline — the feature is internal and existing review-agent docs (if any) remain accurate.

subItems.title: docs/USAGE.md contains no 'Convoys' heading, TOC entry, or example `pan convoy` command
docs/INDEX.md contains no convoy references

items.title: Verify quality gates and end-to-end review flow

narrative.Action: Run npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm test. All must pass. Additionally, exercise the inlined review pipeline by triggering a review on a test PR (or via the review-agent entry point with a minimal ReviewContext) and confirm that all 4 reviewer outputs plus synthesis.md are produced in .claude/reviews/<id>/ and that a ReviewResult is returned with a sensible reviewResult value.

subItems.title: npm run typecheck exits 0
npm run lint exits 0
npm test exits 0 (root + frontend)
An end-to-end invocation of spawnReviewAgent against a test PR produces correctness.md, security.md, performance.md, requirements.md, and synthesis.md in a single .claude/reviews/<id>/ directory
Grep of the entire repo (src/, docs/, packages/, scripts/) for the string 'convoy' returns zero hits outside of generated/vendor files
